mapper.select:
with resolved_candidates as ( select oi.onboarding_id as onboardingId, oi.company_id as companyId, oi.employee_id as employeeId,
coalesce( ep_by_employee_id.user_id, ep_by_user_id.user_id, u_direct.user_id ) as employeeUserId,
coalesce( ep_by_employee_id.manager_user_id, ep_by_user_id.manager_user_id, dept_by_employee.department_manager_user_id, dept_by_user.department_manager_user_id ) as managerUserId,
st.survey_template_id as templateId, st.name as templateName, st.stage as stage, st.target_role as targetRole,
case when upper(st.target_role) = 'EMPLOYEE' then coalesce( ep_by_employee_id.user_id, ep_by_user_id.user_id, u_direct.user_id )
when upper(st.target_role) = 'MANAGER' then coalesce( ep_by_employee_id.manager_user_id, ep_by_user_id.manager_user_id, dept_by_employee.department_manager_user_id, dept_by_user.department_manager_user_id )
else null end as responderUserId,
( oi.start_date + case when upper(st.stage) = 'D7' then interval '7 day' when upper(st.stage) = 'D30' then interval '30 day' when upper(st.stage) = 'D60' then interval '60 day' else interval '0 day' end ) as scheduledAt,
( oi.start_date + case when upper(st.stage) = 'D7' then interval '7 day' when upper(st.stage) = 'D30' then interval '30 day' when upper(st.stage) = 'D60' then interval '60 day' else interval '0 day' end + interval '7 day' ) as closedAt
from onboarding_instances oi
left join employee_profiles ep_by_employee_id on ep_by_employee_id.employee_id = oi.employee_id and ep_by_employee_id.company_id = oi.company_id
left join employee_profiles ep_by_user_id on ep_by_user_id.user_id = oi.employee_id and ep_by_user_id.company_id = oi.company_id
left join users u_direct on u_direct.user_id = oi.employee_id and u_direct.company_id = oi.company_id
left join ( select department_id, company_id, manager_user_id as department_manager_user_id from departments where manager_user_id is not null ) dept_by_employee on dept_by_employee.department_id = ep_by_employee_id.department_id and dept_by_employee.company_id = oi.company_id
left join ( select department_id, company_id, manager_user_id as department_manager_user_id from departments where manager_user_id is not null ) dept_by_user on dept_by_user.department_id = ep_by_user_id.department_id and dept_by_user.company_id = oi.company_id
join survey_templates st on st.company_id = oi.company_id
where st.status = 'ACTIVE' and st.is_default = true and upper(st.stage) in ('D7', 'D30', 'D60') and upper(st.target_role) in ('EMPLOYEE', 'MANAGER')
and oi.start_date is not null and oi.employee_id is not null and upper(oi.status) in ('ACTIVE', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'INPROGRESS')
and ( oi.start_date + case when upper(st.stage) = 'D7' then interval '7 day' when upper(st.stage) = 'D30' then interval '30 day' when upper(st.stage) = 'D60' then interval '60 day' else interval '0 day' end ) <= #{now} )
select rc.onboardingId, rc.companyId, rc.employeeId, rc.employeeUserId, rc.managerUserId, rc.templateId, rc.templateName, rc.stage, rc.targetRole, rc.responderUserId, rc.scheduledAt, rc.closedAt from resolved_candidates rc where rc.responderUserId is not null
and ( ( upper(rc.targetRole) = 'EMPLOYEE' and exists ( select 1 from user_roles ur join roles r on r.role_id = ur.role_id and r.company_id = ur.company_id where ur.company_id = rc.companyId and ur.user_id = rc.responderUserId and upper(r.code) = 'EMPLOYEE' ) ) or ( upper(rc.targetRole) = 'MANAGER' and exists ( select 1 from user_roles ur join roles r on r.role_id = ur.role_id and r.company_id = ur.company_id where ur.company_id = rc.companyId and ur.user_id = rc.responderUserId and upper(r.code) = 'MANAGER' ) ) )
and not exists ( select 1 from user_roles ur join roles r on r.role_id = ur.role_id and r.company_id = ur.company_id where ur.company_id = rc.companyId and ur.user_id = rc.responderUserId and upper(r.code) in ('HR', 'HR_ADMIN', 'ADMIN', 'PLATFORM_ADMIN') )
and not exists ( select 1 from survey_instances si where si.company_id = rc.companyId and si.onboarding_id = rc.onboardingId and si.survey_template_id = rc.templateId and si.responder_user_id = rc.responderUserId and si.status <> 'CANCELLED' )
order by rc.scheduledAt asc, rc.stage asc, rc.targetRole asc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into survey_instances ( survey_instance_id, company_id, onboarding_id, survey_template_id, responder_user_id, scheduled_at, sent_at, closed_at, status, created_at, updated_at ) select #{surveyInstanceId}, #{companyId}, #{onboardingId}, #{templateId}, #{responderUserId}, #{scheduledAt}, now(), #{closedAt}, 'SENT', now(), now() where not exists ( select 1 from survey_instances si where si.company_id = #{companyId} and si.onboarding_id = #{onboardingId} and si.survey_template_id = #{templateId} and si.responder_user_id = #{responderUserId} and si.status <> 'CANCELLED' )
